query: amateur snapshot with crooked tilted horizon, accidentally rotated photo, off-kilter handheld shot
message: composition_and_structure / unconventional_framing — anti_aesthetic. Off-kilter, dutch-angle, accidentally rotated handheld snapshots with informal vernacular framing. Includes parties, sports wipeouts, fallen signs, casual portraiture, awkward angles.

response.objective_caption: An interior view from the rear passenger seat of an auto-rickshaw, showing the back of a driver wearing a wrapped tan turban and a horizontally striped shirt. The driver’s face is reflected in the rectangular rearview mirror mounted on the windshield. Through the front glass, a daytime street stretches ahead with multiple vehicles, including black-and-yellow auto-rickshaws and cars, traveling along a road lined with trees. On the left side of the windshield hangs a circular ornament with gold and red detailing, and the teal dashboard below the mirror holds small devotional stickers depicting robed, turbaned figures.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An interior view from the rear passenger seat of an auto-rickshaw, rendered with heavy analog film grain, noise, and textured surface qualities that create an organic, archival feel. The back of a driver wearing a wrapped tan turban and a horizontally striped shirt fills the right foreground, while his face is reflected in the rectangular rearview mirror mounted on the windshield. Through the front glass, a daytime street stretches ahead with multiple vehicles, including black-and-yellow auto-rickshaws and cars, traveling along a road lined with trees. A circular gold-and-red ornament hangs on the left side of the windshield, and the teal dashboard below the mirror holds small devotional stickers depicting robed, turbaned figures.
